meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy: Stop Building, Start Monetizing
content.seo_description: Stop the cycle of unfinished projects. Learn how to implement high-conversion SaaS pricing models using Antigravity and Claude Code to ensure profitability.
content.answer_block: You fail to finish projects because you lack the feedback loop of revenue. By implementing tiered SaaS pricing early, you force product-market validation. Use Antigravity to scaffold your billing infrastructure and Claude Code to automate the integration, turning your MVP into a revenue-generating asset that demands completion.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'perfect' codebases that never saw a single dollar. You are stuck in the infinite loop of feature creep, not because you lack technical skill, but because you lack the constraints of a paid customer. When you don't charge, you don't build—you tinker.

Real founders don't finish projects; they ship value. By anchoring your development to a pricing model, you transform your project from a hobby into a business. This is how you break the stagnation, reclaim your focus, and build a product that the market is actually waiting for.

steps.title: Define Your Value Metric
steps.description: Stop guessing. Use Antigravity to analyze your core feature set and map it to a pricing tier that aligns with user success, not just storage or seat counts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current feature set for a SaaS MVP. Design a three-tier pricing structure where the middle tier is the primary driver of revenue based on a value-metric like 'tokens processed' or 'automations run'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate a schema for Stripe pricing tiers in my database based on the Antigravity plan'.

steps.title: Scaffold the Billing Gateway
steps.description: Avoid the complexity of custom billing logic. Integrate Stripe Checkout to handle the heavy lifting of tax, compliance, and subscription management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the boilerplate for a Stripe Checkout integration in Next.js, including webhook handlers for subscription lifecycle events.

steps.title: Implement Feature Gating
steps.description: Protect your value. Use middleware to restrict access to premium features based on the active subscription status in your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript middleware function for my router that checks the user's subscription status from the database and redirects to the pricing page if access is denied.

steps.title: Automate Trial-to-Paid Conversion
steps.description: Build an automated email sequence that triggers when a trial is about to expire, using your pricing tiers as the anchor for the value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a logic flow for a trial-to-paid conversion sequence. Map out the triggers for 3-day, 1-day, and 0-day email notifications.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate Resend API for trial expiration email hooks'

steps.title: Pressure-Test with Revenue Analytics
steps.description: Measure what matters. Ensure your dashboard tracks MRR, Churn, and LTV so you can make data-driven decisions on whether to pivot or double down.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a minimal dashboard schema that pulls real-time subscription metrics from Stripe to display MRR and user growth trends.

pro_tips: Never offer a 'Free' tier. Offer a 'Limited Trial' instead to filter out non-serious users and maximize your conversion rate.
Raise prices until you feel uncomfortable. If you aren't losing 20% of your leads to price, you are leaving money on the table.
Use 'Value-Based' pricing over 'Cost-Plus'. Charge for the ROI your tool provides, not the time it took you to build the feature.
Implement an annual discount explicitly to boost upfront cash flow, which is the oxygen required to finish the project.
Automate your churn recovery. If a card fails, your system should automatically retry for 14 days before disabling access.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing is live, shift your focus entirely to distribution. Stop touching the code and spend 100% of your time on customer acquisition until you hit your first $1,000 MRR.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for your customers. You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to finally ship. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
